# External Scene Assets

Assets in this folder are used as source material for the normalized Dream Coastline scene tileset.

- TopDown Interior Home Tileset by BTL games: https://btl-games.itch.io/topdown, CC0.
- Roguelike Modern City pack by Kenney: https://opengameart.org/content/roguelike-modern-city-pack, CC0.
- Modern City Extension by surt: https://opengameart.org/content/modern-city-extension, CC0.
